headline: Colts ink Notre Dame basketball player Carson Towt as TE prospect
description: Carson Towt, a 6-foot-8, 250-pound forward on Notre Dame's men's basketball team this season, has signed with the Indianapolis Colts as a tight end prospect.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Mel Kiper's pick predictions for Round 1
description: Team needs have shifted in free agency, so how will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the NFL draft's first 32 picks.

headline: 2026 NFL draft full order: AFC, NFC team picks in all rounds
description: The order for all seven rounds of the 2026 NFL draft is set, starting with the Raiders at No. 1 and ending with the Broncos at No. 257.

headline: Source: Dolphins trade Jaylen Waddle to Broncos for picks
description: The Broncos are trading for Dolphins wide receiver Jaylen Waddle in exchange for first-, third- and fourth-round picks in this year's draft, a source told ESPN.

headline: Stephen A. stunned by Orlovsky's take on gap between Mendoza and Simpson
description: Stephen A. Smith and Dan Orlovsky compare Ty Simpson and Fernando Mendoza as prospects ahead of the NFL draft.

headline: Kiper: Mendoza is a 'franchise QB'
description: Mel Kiper Jr. and Dan Orlovsky discuss Fernando Mendoza's abilities going into the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: 2026 NFL mock drafts: Latest ESPN player, team predictions
description: Here are our experts' NFL mock drafts for the 2026 cycle, including projected landing spots for all the top quarterbacks.

headline: Boye Mafe to help fill void in Bengals' post-Trey Hendrickson era
description: In 2023 and 2024, Mafe combined for 15 sacks, and the Bengals are hoping he can reach the next level in Cincinnati.
